title: Angel Blood Etc split
wikitext:
[]: Angel Blood Etc. [split]             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Apr 08, 2009 10:31 pm [Tangent from here .] Reichu wrote: (See e.g. Ramiel's giant corpse lying around for weeks or months without polluting the entire city.)

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Apr 09, 2009 6:40 am Decomposers just finish the job. Even without bacteria (even those in the intestines), a dead body will decompose. Just not as thoroughly. Something the size of Ramiel decomposing, with or without microbial action, would have flooded Tokyo-3 with enough PWM gas to choke half the population to death.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Apr 09, 2009 2:30 pm your still thinking of normal biology tho. a crystal angel probably isnt made of individual cells

[]:             Quote Post by DummyPlug » Thu Apr 09, 2009 3:21 pm I think the real explanation is that Eva is not supposed to make perfect sense scientifically. After all, it's supposed to be 'metaphysical biology' which in the real world would be a laughable concept. Sometimes people read too much into these things.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Apr 09, 2009 3:49 pm Axell wrote: your still thinking of normal biology tho. a crystal angel probably isnt made of individual cells

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Apr 09, 2009 4:27 pm speaking of blood, do angels use blood to transport energy from the s2 organ like we transport O2? also, noting that blood is the same color as lcl now, perhaps lcl is what every angel uses for blood, lilith obviously does. theres many discrepancies with this like sachiels blood being blue, but then again there does seem to be different versions of lcl.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Apr 09, 2009 7:08 pm Axell wrote: also, noting that blood is the same color as lcl now

[]:             Quote Post by pikadourei » Fri Apr 10, 2009 3:20 am Axell wrote: speaking of blood, do angels use blood to transport energy from the s2 organ like we transport O2? also, noting that blood is the same color as lcl now, perhaps lcl is what every angel uses for blood, lilith obviously does. theres many discrepancies with this like sachiels blood being blue, but then again there does seem to be different versions of lcl.

[]:             Quote Post by DummyPlug » Fri Apr 10, 2009 3:32 am As far as I know lcl is still orange, blood or whatever it is on the oceans is red. If you want to get scientific I would say that a huge creature with a standing posture like many angels would probably need to be an endotherm because of the increased activity that the posture and movement demands. This would also mean that the creature would have to eat like crazy to keep that huge body warm for days. Axell wrote: speaking of blood, do angels use blood to transport energy from the s2 organ like we transport O2?
